name: Crazy Peanut Butter Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the 3 heaping tablespoons of peanut butter, 3 heaping tablespoons of Crisco, powdered sugar, 1/2 cup of milk, and 1 teaspoon of vanilla extract.
2. Gradually add cocoa powder and chocolate syrup to taste.
3. Mix until smooth and spread on a chocolate cake.
